knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: Converged typecode structure, ordering values, enclosure-related ordering logic, options coding, and datasheet-generation-relevant technical references for Danfoss VLT HVAC Drive FC 102 across low/medium power A/B/C frames and high-power D/E frames, based strictly on the uploaded selection guide and design guides.
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: The uploaded documents together cover FC 102 family overview, ordering/typecode structures for A/B/C and D/E enclosures, option coding, and technical references. The selection guide extends coverage to D, E and F enclosure overview and ordering pages, while the two design guides provide the detailed character-position ordering logic for A/B/C and D/E families. No separate F-frame design guide is uploaded. No complete enclosed-drive typecode table has been extracted from the uploaded documents in this part.
unresolved_global_gaps: Complete ordering type code for enclosed drive enclosures not extracted from the uploaded documents in this part
F-enclosure detailed typecode structure beyond selection-guide ordering page is NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
Some selection-guide ordering page text is truncated in the currently retrieved snippets and may require later convergence with additional retrieved pages
Any datasheet field that depends on non-uploaded manuals remains NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS

conflicts_detected.summary: The selection guide states portfolio coverage up to 1.1-1400 kW, the A/B/C design guide covers 1.1-90 kW, and the D/E design guide covers 110-800 kW. These are not necessarily contradictory, but they represent different document scopes and must not be flattened into one identical source scope.

source_registry.short_title: Selection Guide | VLT HVAC Drive FC 102
source_registry.scope_summary: Family portfolio overview, application coverage, ordering type code pages for A/B/C enclosures and D/E/F enclosures, plus enclosure overview tables.
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Lists ordering type code for A, B and C enclosures on doc_selection_guide p.52
Lists enclosure overview D, E and F on doc_selection_guide p.53
Lists ordering type code for D, E and F enclosures on doc_selection_guide p.58
States supported motor technologies IM, IPM, LSPM, SPM, SynRM

source_registry.short_title: Design Guide VLT HVAC Drive FC 102 1.1-90 kW MG11BC02
source_registry.scope_summary: Detailed ordering form and type code string for low and medium power A/B/C frame FC 102 variants, including character positions and option codes.
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Provides explicit type code example string
Defines character positions 1-39 for low and medium power type code string
Provides mains option and adaptation codes specific to A/B/C family

source_registry.short_title: Design Guide VLT HVAC Drive FC 102 110-800 kW Enclosure Sizes D and E MG16Z202
source_registry.scope_summary: Detailed ordering type code for D1h-D8h and E1h-E4h enclosures, including character positions, hardware configurations, and FC 102 option coding.
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Provides explicit type code example string
Defines ordered character positions for D/E family type code string
Provides shared FC 102 A/B/C/D option codes for these enclosures
Provides D1h-D8h and E1h-E4h specific enclosure code values

typecode_structure.segment_label_from_manual: Product group & FC Series / Product group
typecode_structure.explanation: FC 102 family identifier at the beginning of the type code string.
Encodes the ordered power/model code. The exact values depend on enclosure family and document scope.

For A/B/C low-medium power design guide, position 11 is the phase designator T for 3 phases and position 12 completes the mains-voltage code. In D/E ordering tables the 2-character mains-voltage code is represented jointly as positions 11-12.
Voltage code. For A/B/C, built from T plus the voltage digit. For D/E, directly listed as the 2-character voltage code.
Encodes enclosure and protection-rating combination. Allowed values differ between A/B/C and D/E families.
EMC/RFI filter configuration code.
Brake / brake chopper / regeneration / safe stop related hardware code, depending on family.
Local control panel selection.
PCB coating and ruggedization selection.
Main supply/disconnector/load sharing/circuit breaker related hardware option code. Allowed values differ by family.
Physical/mechanical adaptation code. Definitions differ by family.
Second physical/mechanical adaptation code. A/B/C low-medium power guide shows this as reserved; D/E guide uses this as hardware adaptation B.
Software release code. In D/E guide, text also shows SXXX latest release standard software and S067 integrated motion control software.
Language pack code, default X in retrieved ordering tables.
Fieldbus/network option code.
Functional extension option code.
C0/E0 option positions. Retrieved pages show only CX no option.

typecode_structure.segment_label_from_manual: C1 options / C1 options-A-B in C option adapter
typecode_structure.explanation: C1 option position. Retrieved pages show X no option and R extended relay card MCB 113 for D/E family.
Software controller code for C option positions; retrieved pages show XX standard controller/software.
24 V backup supply option code.

typecode_values.notes: Shown in D/E type code example and D/E ordering tables. A/B/C guide expresses the same family as FC 102 in positions 1-6.

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: If segment equals FC-102 or FC 102, map to VLT HVAC Drive FC 102
Map power code (e.g. P1K1, P90K) to kW and Hp rating using selection guide table
required_additional_conditions: Must match enclosure family A/B/C for P-format codes

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: Translate T2, T4, T6, T7 codes to voltage ranges
Map enclosure code to IP/NEMA rating or enclosure frame

constraints.exact_rule: T2 voltage option only applies to A/B/C enclosure families
D/E enclosure families support T4 and T7 voltage codes
P-format power codes (e.g. P1K1, P90K) are defined for A/B/C enclosure ordering structure
Typecode length spans positions 1-39 for FC 102 ordering string in A/B/C design guide
Typecode includes structured option positions through at least position 39 for D/E ordering structure

family_detection_rules: If typecode begins with FC-102 or FC 102 then product family is VLT HVAC Drive FC 102
fallback_rules: If a segment value is not found in tables return NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
If enclosure-specific interpretation is required prioritize matching design guide (ABC vs DE)
